mapper.insert: insert into dollar_favorite ( f_no, f_member_id, f_base, f_target, f_memo, f_reg_date ) values ( dollar_favorite_seq.nextval, #{f_member_id}, #{f_base}, #{f_target}, #{f_memo}, sysdate )
mapper.select: select * from dollar_favorite where f_member_id = #{value} order by f_reg_date desc
